items.title: These Two Companies Are Set to Join the S&P 500 Soon
items.description: Solstice Advance Materials is set to replace CarMax before Friday's open, S&P Dow Jones Indices said late Monday, while Qnity Electronics will replace Eastman Chemical before the start of trading next Tuesday.
